records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Astonied (<?/); p. pr. & vb. n. Astonying. See Astone.]

defs: To stun; to bewilder; to astonish; to dismay.
quotes: The captain of the Helots . . . strake Palladius upon the side of his head, that he reeled astonied.
This sodeyn cas this man astonied so, That reed he wex, abayst, and al quaking.
